altKrispSwitch.description: Makes the Noise Suppression Popout switch between None and Krisp instead of Krisp and Standard (Equicord-only)

alwaysExpandProfiles.description: Always expands profile popouts to the full modal (Equicord-only)

alwaysExpandRoles.description: Always expands the role list in profile popouts (Equicord-only)

alwaysTrust.description: Removes the annoying untrusted domain and suspicious file popup (Equicord-only)

domain.description: Remove the untrusted domain popup when opening links (restart required)

file.description: Remove the 'Potentially Dangerous Download' popup when opening links (restart required)

noDeleteSafety.description: Removes the enter server name requirement when deleting a server (restart required)

confirmModal.description: Should a "are you sure you want to delete" modal be shown?

animalese.description: Plays animal crossing animalese for every message sent (they yap a lot) (Equicord-only)

messageLengthLimit.description: Maximum length of message to process

processOwnMessages.description: Enable to yap your own messages too

anonymiseByDefault.description: Whether to anonymise file names by default

method.description:
Anonymising method

Values: 0 = Random Characters, 1 = Consistent, 2 = Timestamp

AutoDNDWhilePlaying.description: Automatically updates your online status (online, idle, dnd) when launching games (Equicord-only)

statusToSet.description: Status to set while playing a game

excludeInvisible.description: Prevent automatic status changes while your status is set to invisible

autoZipper.description: Automatically zips specified file types and folders before uploading to Discord (Equicord-only)

extensions.description: Comma-separated list of file extensions to auto-zip (e.g., .psd,.blend,.exe,.dmg)

bannersEverywhere.description: Displays banners in the member list  (Equicord-only)

betterActivities.description: Shows activity icons in the member list and allows showing all activities (Equicord-only)

memberList.description: Show activity icons in the member list (restart required)

specialFirst.description: Show special activities first (Currently Spotify and Twitch)

removeGameActivityStatus.description: Remove game activity icon and status (restart required)

userPopout.description: Show all activities in the profile popout/sidebar (restart required)

betterAudioPlayer.description: Adds a spectrograph and oscilloscope visualizer to audio attachment players. (Equicord-only)

oscilloscopeSolidColor.description: Use a solid color for the oscilloscope.

oscilloscopeColor.description: Color for the oscilloscope (R, G, B or #hex).

spectrographSolidColor.description: Use a solid color for the spectrograph.

spectrographColor.description: Color for the spectrograph (R, G, B or #hex).

betterBanReasons.description: Create custom reasons to use in the Discord ban modal, and/or show a text input by default instead of the options. (Equicord-only)

isTextInputDefault.description: Shows a text input instead of a select menu by default. (Equivalent to clicking the "Other" option)

betterBlockedUsers.description: Allows you to search in blocked users list and makes names selectable in settings. (Equicord-only)

betterCommands.description: Enhances the command system with miscellaneous improvements. (Equicord-only)

autoFillArguments.description: Automatically fill command with all arguements instead of just required ones

allowNewlinesInCommands.description: Allow newlines in command inputs (CTRL + Shift + Enter)

betterFolders.description: Shows server folders on dedicated sidebar and adds folder related improvements (Equicord-only)

sidebar.description: Display servers from folder on dedicated sidebar (restart required)

closeAllFolders.description: Close all folders when selecting a server not in a folder

closeAllHomeButton.description: Close all folders when clicking on the home button (restart required)

closeOthers.description: Close other folders when opening a folder

closeServerFolder.description: Close folder when selecting a server in that folder

forceOpen.description: Force a folder to open when switching to a server of that folder

keepIcons.description: Keep showing guild icons in the primary guild bar folder when it's open in the BetterFolders sidebar (restart required)

showFolderIcon.description:
Show the folder icon above the folder guilds in the BetterFolders sidebar (restart required)

Values: 0 = Never, 1 = Always, 2 = When more than one folder is expanded

betterGifPicker.description: Makes the gif picker open the favourite category by default (Equicord-only)

keepOpen.description: Keeps the gif picker open after selecting a gif

betterInvites.description: See invites expiration date, view inviter profile and preview servers before joining by clicking the name (Equicord-only)

betterPlusReacts.description: The amount of plus before :emoji: is the message to add it to (Equicord-only)

blockKeywords.description: Blocks messages containing specific user-defined keywords, as if the user sending them was blocked. (Equicord-only)

blockedWords.description: Comma-seperated list of words to block (restart required)

useRegex.description: Use each value as a regular expression when checking message content (advanced) (restart required)

caseSensitive.description: Whether to use a case sensitive search or not (restart required)

ignoreBlockedMessages.description: Completely ignores (recent) new messages bar (restart required)

BlurNSFW.description: Blur attachments in NSFW channels until hovered (Equicord-only)

blurAllChannels.description: Blur attachments in all channels (not just NSFW)

bypassPinPrompt.description: Bypass the pin prompt when using the pin functions (Equicord-only)

bypassStatus.description: Still get notifications from specific sources when in do not disturb mode. Right-click on users/channels/guilds to set them to bypass do not disturb mode. (Equicord-only)

guilds.description: Guilds to let bypass (notified when pinged anywhere in guild)

channels.description: Channels to let bypass (notified when pinged in that channel)

users.description: Users to let bypass (notified for all messages sent in DMs)

allowOutsideOfDms.description: Allow selected users to bypass status outside of DMs too (acts like a channel/guild bypass, but it's for all messages sent by the selected users)

notificationSound.description: Whether the notification sound should be played

callTimer.description: Add call timers for all users in voice channels and in the connection status. (Equicord-only)

allCallTimers.description: Add call timer to all users in a server voice channel (restart required)

showWithoutHover.description: Always show the timer without needing to hover (restart required)

showRoleColor.description: Show the user's role color (if this plugin in enabled)

watchLargeGuilds.description: Track users in large guilds. This may cause lag if you're in a lot of large guilds with active voice users. Tested with up to 2000 active voice users with no issues. (restart required)

channelBadges.description: Adds badges to channels based on their type (Equicord-only)

oneBadgePerChannel.description: Show only one badge per channel (restart required)

channelTabs.description: Group your commonly visited channels in tabs, like a browser (Equicord-only)

characterCounter.description: Adds a character counter to the chat input (Equicord-only)

colorEffects.description: Enable yellow/red colouring as you get closer to the character limit

cleanChannelName.description: remove all emoji and decor shit from channel names (Equicord-only)

cleanerChannelGroups.description: Hides all channels in collapsed categories, even if they have unread messages. (Equicord-only)

clickableRoles.description: Click on roles in user profiles and the member list to see which members have them. (Equicord-only)

clientSideBlock.description: Allows you to locally hide almost all content from any user (Equicord-only)

hideVc.description: Hide voice channels containing blocked users. (restart required)

usersToBlock.description: User IDs seperated by a comma and a space (restart required)

hideBlockedUsers.description: Should blocked users should also be hidden everywhere (restart required)

hideBlockedMessages.description: Should messages from blocked users should be hidden fully (same as the old noblockedmessages plugin) (restart required)

hideEmptyRoles.description: Should role headers be hidden if all of their members are blocked (restart required)

blockedReplyDisplay.description: What should display instead of the message when someone replies to someone you have hidden (restart required)

guildBlackList.description: Guild ids to disable functionality in (restart required)

guildWhiteList.description: Guild ids to enable functionality in (restart required)

clipsEnhancements.description: Add more Clip FPS and duration options, custom clip length, RPC tagging and more (Equicord-only)

richPresenceTagging.description: When should clips be tagged with the current Rich Presence?

enableScreenshotKeybind.description: Enable the screenshot keybind feature (restart required)

enableVoiceOnlyClips.description: Enable voice-only clips (audio without video) (restart required)

enableAdvancedSignals.description: Enable advanced clip signals (auto-clip triggers) (restart required)

ignorePlatformRestriction.description: Allow Platform Restricted Clipping (may cause save errors) (restart required)

commandPalette.description: Quickly run actions through a searchable command palette (Equicord-only)

compactStartEnabled.description: Open the palette in compact mode first.

closeAfterExecute.description: Close palette after executing a command.

components.description: Adds a new tab to settings to browse Discord components. (Equicord-only)

contentWarning.description: Allows you to specify certain trigger words that will be blurred by default. Hovering/Clicking on the blurred content will reveal it. (Equicord-only)

onClick.description: Only show trigger content on click instead of hover

copyProfileColors.description: A plugin to copy people's profile gradient colors to clipboard. (Equicord-only)

copyStatusUrls.description: Copy the users status url when you right-click it (Equicord-only)

copyUserMention.description: Adds a button to copy user's mention on the user context menu, works best with ValidUser. (Equicord-only)

customFolderIcons.description: Customize folder icons with any png (Equicord-only)

solidIcon.description: Use a solid background on the background of the image

customTimestamps.description: Custom timestamps on messages and tooltips (Equicord-only)

customUserColors.description: Lets you add a custom color to any user, anywhere! Highly recommend to use with typingTweaks and roleColorEverywhere (Equicord-only)

dmList.description: Users with custom colors defined will have their name in the dm list colored

colorInServers.description: If name colors should be changed within servers

declutter.description: Cleans up Discord by removing non-essential UI elements like profile effects, shop tabs, boosts, and more. (Equicord-only)

removeProfileEffect.description: Remove profile animation effects on open. (restart required)

alwaysShowUsername.description: Always show username instead of status. (restart required)

removeShopAboveDM.description: Remove shops above DMs list. (restart required)

removeQuestsAboveDM.description: Remove quests above DMs list. (restart required)

removeServerBoostInfo.description: Remove server boost info above channel list. (restart required)

removeUnavailableEmojiPicker.description: Remove unavailable categories from the emoji picker. (restart required)

removeAudioMenus.description: Remove menus next to mute and deafen buttons. (restart required)

decodeBase64.description: Decode base64 content of any message and copy the decoded content. (Equicord-only)

clickMethod.description: Change the button to decode base64 content of any message.

devCompanion.description: Dev Companion Plugin. Please report anything not working or being weird (most likely its a bug) to sadan, either ping or dm, thanks! (Equicord-only)

notifyOnAutoConnect.description: Whether to notify when Dev Companion has automatically connected.

usePatchedModule.description: On extract requests, reply with the current patched module (if it is patched) instead of the original.

reloadAfterToggle.description: Reload after a disable/enable plugin command is recived.

disableCameras.description: Disables cameras in a call by default (Equicord-only)

discordDevBanner.description: Enables the Discord developer banner, in which displays the build-ID (Equicord-only)

dragFavoriteEmotes.description: Adds the ability to change the order of your favourite emotes (Equicord-only)

dragify.description: Drop users, channels, or servers into chat to insert mentions or invites. (Equicord-only)

inviteExpireAfter.description:
Invite expiration.

Values: 1800 = 30 minutes, 3600 = 1 hour, 21600 = 6 hours, 43200 = 12 hours, 86400 = 1 day, 604800 = 7 days, 0 = Never

inviteMaxUses.description:
Invite max uses.

Values: 0 = No limit, 1 = 1 use, 5 = 5 uses, 10 = 10 uses, 25 = 25 uses, 50 = 50 uses, 100 = 100 uses

reuseExistingInvites.description: Reuse existing invite instead of creating a new one.

allowChatBodyDrop.description: Allow dropping into the main chat body to insert text. (restart required)

showClasses.description: Display the element's CSS class names in the tooltip

showId.description: Display the element's ID attribute in the tooltip

showFont.description: Display the computed font family and font size

showPosition.description: Display the element's CSS position type and z-index

showDisplay.description: Display the element's display type along with flex or grid properties

equibopStreamFixes.description: Tries to fix stream quality on Equibop by patching Discord's encoder and quality restrictions. (Equicord-only)

unlockQualityOptions.description: Unlock stream quality options regardless of Nitro status (restart required)

forceEncoderSettings.description: Force encoder to use configured resolution/fps (restart required)

preventDownscale.description: Prevent Discord from downscaling stream resolution (restart required)

keyframeInterval.description: Keyframe interval in ms (0 = encoder default, 5000 = every 5s) (restart required)

minBitrate.description: Minimum encoder bitrate in kbps (restart required)

raiseBitrateCaps.description: Raise default desktop bitrate caps (600kbps target → 10Mbps, 3.5Mbps max → 40Mbps) (restart required)

preventFramerateReduction.description: Prevent Discord from reducing stream framerate when not speaking (restart required)

bitsPerPixelPct.description: Bits per pixel percentage for target bitrate (8 = 0.08 bpp, 12 = 0.12bpp)

equicordHelper.description: Used to provide support, fix discord caused crashes, and other misc features. (Equicord-only)

noMirroredCamera.description: Prevents the camera from being mirrored on your screen (restart required)

removeActivitySection.description: Removes the activity section above member list (restart required)

showYourOwnActivityButtons.description: Discord hides your own activity buttons for some reason (restart required)

refreshSlashCommands.description: Refreshes Slash Commands to show newly added commands without restarting your client.

forceRoleIcon.description: Forces role icons to display next to messages in compact mode (restart required)

accountStandingButton.description: Show an account standing button in the header bar (restart required)

restoreFileDownloadButton.description: Adds back the Download button at the top right corner of files (restart required)

noBulletPoints.description: Stops you from typing markdown bullet points (stinky) (restart required)

noModalAnimation.description: Remove the 300ms long animation when opening or closing modals (restart required)

disableAdoptTagPrompt.description: Disable the prompt to adopt tags (restart required)

equicordToolbox.description: Adds a button next to the inbox button in the channel header that houses Equicord quick actions (Equicord-only)

showPluginMenu.description: Show the plugins menu in the toolbox

equissant.description: Crossant every specified amount of clicks :trolley: (Equicord-only)

amount.description: amount of clicks to trigger crossant

exitSounds.description: Play soundboard sounds when you disconnect from voice. (Equicord-only)

experiments.description: Enable Access to Experiments & other dev-only features in Discord! (Equicord-only)

toolbarDevMenu.description: Change the Help (?) toolbar button (top right in chat) to Discord's developer menu (restart required)

exportMessages.description: Allows you to export any message to a file (Equicord-only)

openFileAfterExport.description: Open the exported file in the default file handler after export

exportContacts.description: Export a list of friends to your clipboard. Adds a new button to the menu bar for the friends tab.

fastDeleteChannels.description: Adds a trash icon to delete channels (Equicord-only)

keyBind.description: The key to toggle trash when pressed.

favoriteEmojiFirst.description: Puts your favorite emoji first in the emoji autocomplete and also has emoji alias. (Equicord-only)

favouriteAnything.description: Favourite any image, video, or file attachment (Equicord-only)

fileUpload.description: Upload images and videos to file hosting services like Zipline and Nest (Equicord-only)

autoSend.description: Insert uploaded URL in chat input

autoFormat.description: Wrap inserted URL in angle brackets

interceptDiscordUpload.description: Intercept Discord uploads and use FileUpload instead.

interceptDiscordUploadOnlyOverLimit.description: Only intercept uploads that exceed Discord file size limit.

stripQueryParams.description: Strip query params from uploaded URLs

corsProxyUrl.description: CORS proxy URL used for browser uploads

findReply.description: Jumps to the earliest reply to a message in a channel (lets you follow past conversations more easily). (Equicord-only)

includePings.description: Will also search for messages that @ the author directly

includeAuthor.description: Will also search for messages that reply to the author in general, not just that exact message

hideButtonIfNoReply.description: Hides the button if there are no replies to the message (restart required)

fixFileExtensions.description: Fixes file extensions by renaming them to a compatible supported format if possible (Equicord-only)

followVoiceUser.description: Follow a friend in voice chat. (Equicord-only)

onlyWhenInVoice.description: Only follow the user when you are in a voice channel

leaveWhenUserLeaves.description: Leave the voice channel when the user leaves. (That can cause you to sometimes enter infinite leave/join loop)

fontLoader.description: Loads any font from Google Fonts (Equicord-only)

applyOnCodeBlocks.description: Apply the font to code blocks

forwardAnywhere.description: If a forward fails send it as a normal message also allows nsfw forwards (Equicord-only)

forwardPreface.description: What should forwarded from be prefaced with

frequentQuickSwitcher.description: Rewrites and filters the quick switcher results to be your most frequent channels (Equicord-only)

friendCodes.description: Generate FriendCodes to easily add friends (Equicord-only)

friendshipRanks.description: Adds badges showcasing how long you have been friends with a user for (Equicord-only)

friendTags.description: Allows you to filter by custom tags in the quick switcher by starting a search with & (Equicord-only)

FullVCPFP.description: Makes avatars take up the entire vc tile (Equicord-only)

ghosted.description: A cute ghost will appear if you don't answer their DMs (Equicord-only)

showIndicator.description: Show the ghost counter at the top of the server list

showDmIcons.description: Show ghost icons next to individual DMs

ignoreGroupDms.description: Exclude all group dms from ghosting

exemptedChannels.description: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to exempt from ghosting (right-click a DM channel to copy its ID)

maxInactiveTimeMs.description:
Only ghost DMs active within this timeframe

Values: 0 = No limit, 3600000 = 1 hour, 86400000 = 1 day, 604800000 = 1 week, 2592000000 = 1 month

gifCollections.description: Allows you to create collections of gifs (Equicord-only)

itemPrefix.description: The prefix for gif items (restart required)

showCopyImageLink.description: Show 'Copy Image Link' option in context menus

preventDuplicates.description: Prevent adding the same GIF to a collection multiple times

defaultEmptyCollectionImage.description: The image / gif that will be shown when a collection has no images / gifs

collectionsSortType.description: The type of sorting for collections

collectionsSortOrder.description: The order of sorting for collections

gitHubRepos.description: Displays a user's public GitHub repositories in their profile (Equicord-only)

globalBadges.description: Adds global badges from other client mods (Equicord-only)

googleThat.description: Adds a command to send a internet search link (Equicord-only)

hyperlink.description: If the sent link should hyperlink with the query as the label

embed.description: If the sent link should render an embed

customEngineURL.description: The URL of the Engine you wish to use

guildPickerDumper.description: Context menu to dump and download a server's emojis and stickers. (Equicord-only)

hideChatButtons.description: able to hide the chat buttons (Equicord-only)

hideMessages.description: A plugin to temporarily hide messages until you restart. (Equicord-only)

hidePopoverButton.description: Hide the hide button in the message popover.

hideServers.description: Allows you to hide servers from the guild list and quick switcher by right clicking them (Equicord-only)

showIndicator.description: Show menu to unhide servers at the bottom of the list

holyNotes.description: Save messages as notes to revisit later (Equicord-only)

homeTyping.description: Changes the home button to a typing indicator if someone in your dms is typing (Equicord-only)

hopOn.description: Hop on! Opens a configurable URL when a message matches a custom regex in the current channel. (Equicord-only)

husk.description: Adds Husk button (check settings to change used emoji) (Equicord-only)

findInServer.description: Attempt to find emoji of same name in server before using ID in settings (useful if no nitro)

iconViewer.description: Adds a new tab to settings to preview all icons. (Equicord-only)

idleAutoRestart.description: Automatically restarts the client after being idle for a configurable amount of time, but avoids restarting while you are in VC. (Equicord-only)

idleMinutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before restarting (when not in VC)

ignoreCalls.description: Allows you to ignore calls from specific users or dm groups. (Equicord-only)

permanentlyIgnoredUsers.description: User IDs (comma + space) who should be permanetly ignored (restart required)

ingtoninator.description: Suffixes 'ington' to a random word in your message (Equicord-only)

showIcon.description: Show a button to toggle the Ingtoninator plugin (restart required)

inRole.description: Know who is in a role with the role context menu or /inrole command (read plugin info!) (Equicord-only)

instantScreenshare.description: Instantly screenshare when joining a voice channel with support for desktop sources, windows, and video input devices (cameras, capture cards) (Equicord-only)

invisibleChat.description: Encrypt your Messages in a non-suspicious way! (Equicord-only)

inviteDefaults.description: Allows you to edit the default values when creating server invites. (Equicord-only)

inviteDuration.description:
Invite Duration

Values: 1800 = 30 minutes, 3600 = 1 hour, 21600 = 6 hours, 43200 = 12 hours, 86400 = 1 day, 604800 = 7 days, 0 = Forever

IRememberYou.description: Locally saves everyone you've been communicating with (including servers), in case of lose (Equicord-only)

jumpscare.description: Adds a configurable chance of jumpscaring you whenever you open a channel. Inspired by Geometry Dash Mega Hack (Equicord-only)

imageSource.description: Sets the image url of the jumpscare

audioSource.description: Sets the audio url of the jumpscare

chance.description: The chance of a jumpscare happening (1 in X so: 100 = 1/100 or 1%, 50 = 1/50 or 2%, etc.)

jumpTo.description: Adds context menu options to jump to the start or bottom of a channel/DM. (Equicord-only)

keyboardNavigation.description: Allows you to navigate the UI with a keyboard. (Equicord-only)

hotkey.description: The hotkey to open the command palette.

allowMouseControl.description: Allow the mouse to control the command palette.

keyboardSounds.description: Adds OperaGX or osu! sound effects when typing on your keyboard. (Equicord-only)

keywordNotify.description: Sends a notification if a given message matches certain keywords or regexes (Equicord-only)

amountToKeep.description: Amount of messages to keep in the log

lastActive.description: A plugin to jump to last active message from yourself or another user in a channel/server. (Equicord-only)

LoginWithQR.description: Allows you to login to another device by scanning a login QR code, just like on mobile! (Equicord-only)

mediaPlaybackSpeed.description: Allows changing the (default) playback speed of media embeds (Equicord-only)

messageBurst.description: Merges messages sent within a time period with your previous sent message if no one else sends a message before you. (Equicord-only)

shouldMergeWithAttachment.description: Should the message be merged if the last message has an attachment?

useSpace.description: Whether to add a space between messages when merging instead of new lines.

singleClickModifier.description: Modifier required for single click action (your messages)

singleClickOthersModifier.description: Modifier required for single click action (others' messages)

reactEmoji.description: Emoji to use for react actions.

addAdditionalReacts.description: Also add additional configured reaction emojis

disableInDms.description: Disable all click actions in direct messages

disableInSystemDms.description: Disable all click actions in system DMs

doubleClickHoldThreshold.description: Max hold time for double-click actions (ms). Holding longer allows text selection

deferDoubleClickForTriple.description: Delay double-click to allow triple-click actions (disables triple-click when off)

quoteWithReply.description: When quoting, also reply to the message

useSelectionForQuote.description: When quoting, use selected text if available

messageColors.description: Displays color codes like #FF0042 inside of messages (Equicord-only)

messageFetchTimer.description: Shows how long it took to fetch messages for the current channel (Equicord-only)

showIcon.description: Show fetch time icon in message bar

messageLinkTooltip.description: Adds a tooltip with a message preview when hovering over message links, replies, and forwarded messages. (Equicord-only)

onLink.description: Show tooltip when hovering over message links (restart required)

onReply.description: Show tooltip when hovering over message replies (restart required)

onForward.description: Show tooltip when hovering over forwarded messages (restart required)

messageLogger.description: Temporarily logs deleted and edited messages. (Equicord-only)

collapseDeleted.description: Whether to collapse deleted messages, similar to blocked messages (restart required)

inlineEdits.description: Whether to display edit history as part of message content

ignoreBots.description: Whether to ignore messages by bots

ignoreSelf.description: Whether to ignore messages by yourself

ignoreSelfEdits.description: Whether to ignore edits by yourself

ignoreUsers.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to ignore

ignoreChannels.description: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to ignore

ignoreGuilds.description: Comma-separated list of guild IDs to ignore

showEditDiffs.description: Show visual differences between edited message versions

separatedDiffs.description: Separate addition and removals in diffs for a more readable differential

messageLoggerEnhanced.description: Improves MessageLogger with edited message history, ghost ping detection and more (Equicord-only)

saveMessages.description: Whether to save the deleted and edited messages.

cacheMessagesFromServers.description: Usually message logger only logs from whitelisted ids and dms, enabling this would mean it would log messages from all servers as well. Note that this may cause the cache to exceed its limit, resulting in some messages being missed. If you are in a lot of servers, this may significantly increase the chances of messages being logged, which can result in a large message record and the inclusion of irrelevant messages.

ignoreBots.description: Whether to ignore messages by bots

ignoreWebhooks.description: Whether to ignore messages by webhooks

ignoreSelf.description: Whether to ignore messages by yourself

ignoreMutedGuilds.description: Messages in muted guilds will not be logged. Whitelisted users/channels in muted guilds will still be logged.

ignoreMutedCategories.description: Messages in channels belonging to muted categories will not be logged. Whitelisted users/channels in muted guilds will still be logged.

ignoreMutedChannels.description: Messages in muted channels will not be logged. Whitelisted users/channels in muted guilds will still be logged.

alwaysLogCurrentChannel.description: Always log current selected channel. Blacklisted channels/users will still be ignored.

permanentlyRemoveLogByDefault.description: Vencord's base MessageLogger remove log button wiil delete logs permanently

hideMessageFromMessageLoggers.description: When enabled, a context menu button will be added to messages to allow you to delete messages without them being logged by other loggers. Might not be safe, use at your own risk.

showLogsButton.description: Toggle to whenever show the toolbox or not (restart required)

showWhereMessageIsFrom.description: Show message channel/author name and server name

messagesToDisplayAtOnceInLogs.description: Number of messages to display at once in logs & number of messages to load when loading more messages in logs.

hideMessageFromMessageLoggersDeletedMess.description: The message content to replace the message with when using the hide message from message loggers feature.

messageLimit.description: Maximum number of messages to save. Older messages are deleted when the limit is reached. 0 means there is no limit

attachmentSizeLimitInMegabytes.description: Maximum size of an attachment in megabytes to save. Attachments larger than this size will not be saved.

attachmentFileExtensions.description: Comma separated list of file extensions to save. Attachments with file extensions not in this list will not be saved. Leave empty to save all attachments.

cacheLimit.description: Maximum number of messages to store in the cache. Older messages are deleted when the limit is reached. This helps reduce memory usage and improve performance. 0 means there is no limit

timeBasedCleanupMinutes.description: Automatically remove messages from servers that are older than this many minutes. Set to 0 to disable time-based cleanup.

preserveCurrentChannel.description: When enabled, messages in your currently selected channel are not affected by time-based cleanup.

whitelistedIds.description: Whitelisted server, channel, or user IDs.

blacklistedIds.description: Blacklisted server, channel, or user IDs.

messageNotifier.description: Get toasts for when chosen users send a message (Equicord-only)

users.description: Comma separated list of user ids to get message toasts for

messagePeek.description: Shows the last message preview and timestamp in the Direct Messages list. (Equicord-only)

hideMuted.description: Hide message previews and timestamps for muted DMs and group chats.

messageTranslate.description: Auto translate messages to your language (Equicord-only)

targetLanguage.description: The language messages should be translated to (restart required)

confidenceRequirement.description: The confidence required to translated the message. Best not to edit unless you know what you're doing (restart required)

micLoopbackTester.description: Adds mic loopback test icon to the user panel (Equicord-only)

middleClickTweaks.description: Various middle click tweaks, such as with pasting and link opening. (Equicord-only)

openScope.description: Prevent middle clicking on these content types from opening them.

pasteScope.description: Prevent middle click from pasting during these situations.

pasteThreshold.description: Milliseconds until pasting is enabled again after a middle click.

moreCommands.description: Adds various fun and useful commands (Equicord-only)

moreQuickReactions.description: Improves the quick react buttons in the message context menu. (Equicord-only)

frequentEmojis.description: Use frequently used emojis instead of favourite emojis (restart required)

rows.description: Rows of quick reactions to display

columns.description: Columns of quick reactions to display

compactMode.description: Scales the buttons to 75% of their original scale, whilst increasing the inner emoji to 125% scale. Emojis will be 93.75% of the original size. Recommended to have a minimum of 5 columns

scroll.description: Enable scrolling the list of emojis

moreStickers.description: Adds sticker packs from other social media platforms. (e.g. LINE) (Equicord-only)

promptToUpload.description: Inserts the sticker into your chatbar instead of sending immediately

moreUserTags.description: Adds tags for webhooks and moderative roles (owner, admin, etc.) (Equicord-only)

dontShowForBots.description: Don't show extra tags for bots (excluding webhooks)

dontShowBotTag.description: Only show extra tags for bots / Hide [APP] text (restart required)

showWebhookTagFully.description: Show Webhook tag in followed channels like announcements

moyai.description: Plays a 🗿 sound effect whenever a moyai emoji is sent, reacted, or used as a voice effect in your current channel. (Equicord-only)

triggerWhenUnfocused.description: Trigger the 🗿 even when the window is unfocused

musicControls.description: Music Controls and Lyrics for multiple services  (Equicord-only)

showMusicNoteOnNoLyrics.description: Show a music note icon when no lyrics are found

translateTo.description: Translate lyrics to - Changing this will clear existing translations

fallbackProvider.description: When a lyrics provider fails, try other providers

showFailedToasts.description: Hide toasts when lyrics fail to fetch

useSpotifyUris.description: Open Spotify URIs instead of Spotify URLs. Will only work if you have Spotify installed and might not work on all platforms

previousButtonRestartsTrack.description: Restart currently playing track when pressing the previous button if playtime is >3s

neverPausePreviews.description: Prevents in-call/PiP previews (screenshare, streams, etc) from pausing even if the client loses focus (Equicord-only)

newGuildSettings.description: Automatically mute new servers and change various other settings upon joining (Equicord-only)

messages.description:
Server Notification Settings

Values: 0 = All messages, 1 = Only @mentions, 2 = Nothing, 3 = Server default

voiceChannels.description: Hide names in Voice channels automatically

newPluginsManager.description: Utility that notifies you when new plugins are added to Equicord (Equicord-only)

noBlockedMessages.description: Hide all blocked/ignored messages from chat completely. (Equicord-only)

alsoHideIgnoredUsers.description: Also hide messages from ignored users.

disableNotifications.description: Hide new message notifications for blocked users. Always true if "Default Hide Users" is enabled below and the user triggering the notification is not exempted in "Override Users".

allowAutoModMessages.description: Allow messages sent by AutoMod to bypass filtering.

defaultHideUsers.description: If enabled, messages from blocked users will be completely hidden and any messages from user IDs in the override list will be collapsed (default Discord behavior) instead. If disabled, messages from blocked users will be collapsed and any messages from user IDs in the override list will be completely hidden instead.

overrideUsers.description: Comma separated list of user IDs which will be hidden or collapsed instead of the default behavior selected above.

noNitroUpsell.description: Removes ALL of Discord's nitro upsells by tricking the client into thinking you have nitro. (Equicord-only)

noPushToTalk.description: Bypasses the push-to-talk requirement for voice activity in channels that enforce it. (Equicord-only)

noRoleHeaders.description: We are all equal!! Removes the role headers in the member list. (Equicord-only)

OnePingPerDM.description: If unread messages are sent by a user in DMs multiple times, you'll only receive one audio ping. (Equicord-only)

channelToAffect.description: Select the type of DM for the plugin to affect

allowEveryone.description: Receive audio pings for @everyone and @here in group DMs

ignoreUsers.description: User IDs (comma + space) whose pings should NEVER be throttled (restart required)

alwaysPlaySound.description: Play the message notification sound even when its disabled (restart required)

orbolayBridge.description: Bridge plugin to connect Orbolay to Discord (Equicord-only)

messageAlignment.description: Alignment of messages in the overlay (restart required)

userAlignment.description: Alignment of users in the overlay (restart required)

voiceSemitransparent.description: Make voice channel members transparent (restart required)

partyMode.description: Allows you to use party mode cause the party never ends ✨ (Equicord-only)

superIntensePartyMode.description:
Party intensity

Values: 0 = Normal, 1 = Better, 2 = Project X

pingNotifications.description: Customizable notifications with improved mention formatting (Equicord-only)

friends.description: Notify when friends send messages in servers

showInActive.description: Show notifications even for currently active channel

ignoreMuted.description: Skip notifications from muted servers, channels, or users

pinIcon.description: Adds a pin icon to pinned messages (Equicord-only)

platformIndicators.description: Adds platform indicators (Desktop, Mobile, Web...) to users (Equicord-only)

list.description: Show indicators in the member list

colorMobileIndicator.description: Whether to make the mobile indicator match the color of the user status. (restart required)

showBots.description: Whether to show platform indicators on bots

consoleIcon.description: What console icon to use (restart required)

platformSpoofer.description: Spoof what platform or device you're on (Equicord-only)

platform.description: What platform to show up as on (restart required)

polishWording.description: Tweaks your messages to make them look nicer and have better grammar. See settings (Equicord-only)

quickDisable.description: Quick disable. Turns off message modifying without requiring a client reload.

blockedWords.description: Words that will not be capitalized (comma separated).

fixPunctuationFrequency.description: Percent period frequency (this majorly annoys some people).

profileSets.description: Allows you to save and load different profile presets, via the Profile Section in Settings. (Equicord-only)

questify.description: Enhance your Quest experience with a suite of features, or disable them entirely if they're not your thing. (Equicord-only)

disableQuestsDiscoveryTab.description: Disable Quest tab in the Discovery page.

disableQuestsDirectMessagesTab.description: Disable Quest tab in Direct Messages.

disableQuestsPageSponsoredBanner.description: Disable the sponsored banner on the Quest page.

disableQuestsPopupAboveAccountPanel.description: Disable the Quest popup above your account panel.

disableQuestsBadgeOnUserProfiles.description: Disable the Quest badge on user profiles.

disableQuestsGiftInventoryRelocationNoti.description: Disable the gift inventory Quest relocation notice.

disableFriendsListActiveNowPromotion.description: Disable the promotion of Quests for games played by friends.

disableMembersListActivelyPlayingIcon.description: Disable the actively playing icon in members list items.

makeMobileQuestsDesktopCompatible.description: Make mobile-only Quests compatible with desktop.

completeVideoQuestsInBackground.description: Complete Video Quests in the background after the video duration has passed.

completeGameQuestsInBackground.description: Complete Game Quests in the background after the game duration has passed.

completeAchievementQuestsInBackground.description: Complete Achievement in Activity Quests in the background.

notifyOnQuestComplete.description: Show a notification when a Quest is auto-completed.

questButtonDisplay.description: Which display type to use for the Quest button in the server list.

questRewardIncludeRewardCode.description: Include Quests with Reward Codes when displaying Quest counts.

questRewardIncludeNitroCode.description: Include Quests with Nitro Codes when displaying Quest counts.

questRewardIncludeInGame.description: Include Quests with In-Game rewards when displaying Quest counts.

questRewardIncludeCollectibles.description: Include Quests with Collectibles when displaying Quest counts.

questRewardIncludeOrbs.description: Include Quests with Orbs when displaying Quest counts.

questButtonUnclaimed.description: Which display type to use for the unclaimed indicator on the Quest button in the server list.

questButtonBadgeColor.description: The color of the Quest button badge in the server list.

questButtonLeftClickAction.description: The action to perform when left-clicking the Quest button in the server list.

questButtonMiddleClickAction.description: The action to perform when middle-clicking the Quest button in the server list.

questButtonRightClickAction.description: The action to perform when right-clicking the Quest button in the server list.

fetchingQuestsInterval.description: The interval in seconds to fetch Quests from Discord.

fetchingQuestsAlert.description: The sound to play when new Quests are detected.

fetchingQuestsAlertVolume.description: The volume for the new Quest alert sound.

restyleQuestsUnclaimed.description: The color of unclaimed Quest tiles in the Quests page.

restyleQuestsClaimed.description: The color of claimed Quest tiles in the Quests page.

restyleQuestsIgnored.description: The color of ignored Quest tiles in the Quests page.

restyleQuestsExpired.description: The color of expired Quest tiles in the Quests page.

restyleQuestsGradient.description: Style of the gradient used in the Quest tiles.

restyleQuestsPreload.description: Attempt to preload the assets for the Quest tiles.

reorderQuests.description: Sort Quests by their status. Leave empty for default sorting. Comma-separated list must contain all of: UNCLAIMED, CLAIMED, IGNORED, EXPIRED.

unclaimedUnignoredQuests.description: Tracks the number of unclaimed and unignored Quests.

onQuestsPage.description: Whether the user is currently on the Quests page.

triggerQuestsRerender.description: Trigger a rerender of the Quests page by toggling this setting.

ignoredQuestProfile.description: The profile used for ignored Quests.

rememberQuestPageSort.description: Remember the last used sort on the Quests page.

rememberQuestPageFilters.description: Remember the last used filters on the Quests page.

lastQuestPageSort.description: Remember the last used sort on the Quests page.

lastQuestPageFilters.description: Remember the last used filters on the Quests page.

ignoredQuestIDs.description: An array of Quest IDs that are ignored.

resumeQuestIDs.description: An array of Quest IDs that are being auto-completed in the background.

quickThemeSwitcher.description: Quickly switch between themes using keyboard shortcuts. (Equicord-only)

autoRefresh.description: Auto-refresh theme list when changes are detected

showNotifications.description: Show notifications when themes are added/removed

quoter.description: Adds the ability to create an inspirational quote image from a message. (Equicord-only)

quoteFont.description: Font for quote text (author/username always use M PLUS Rounded 1c)

randomVoice.description: Adds a button near mute to join a random voice channel. (Equicord-only)

userAmountOperation.description: Select an operation for the amounts of users

spacesLeftOperation.description: Select an operation for the maximum amounts of users

vcLimitOperation.description: Select an operation for the voice-channel.

selfMute.description: Automatically mutes your mic when joining voice-channel.

selfDeafen.description: Automatically deafems your mic when joining voice-channel.

leaveEmpty.description: Finds a random-call, when the voice chat is empty.

prioritizeFriends.description: Prefer channels with your friends in them when possible.

video.description: Searches for users with their video on

stream.description: Searches for users who are streaming

mute.description: Searches for users who are muted

deafen.description: Searches for users who are deafened

RecentDMSwitcher.description: Ctrl+Tab between most recently used DMs (Ctrl+Shift+Tab reverse) (Equicord-only)

amountOfUsers.description: Number of users to show in overlay

overlayRowLength.description: Number of recent DMs to show in row

remixRevived.description: Revives Remix and breings it to Desktop (Equicord-only)

repeatMessages.description: Allows you to repeat messages quickly. If you hold shift while clicking the Repeat option, it will reply to the message. (Equicord-only)

replyPingControl.description: Control whether to always or never get pinged on message replies, with a whitelist feature (Equicord-only)

alwaysPingOnReply.description: Always get pinged when someone replies to your messages

replyPingWhitelist.description: Comma-separated list of User IDs to always receive reply pings from

ReviewDB.description: Review other users (Adds a new settings to profiles) (Equicord-only)

notifyReviews.description: Notify about new reviews on startup

showWarning.description: Display warning to be respectful at the top of the reviews list

richMagnetLinks.description: Renders magnet links like message links (Equicord-only)

richPresence.description: Unified rich presence hub for AudioBookShelf, osu!, stats.fm, Jellyfin, ListenBrainz, and Gensokyo Radio. (Equicord-only)

sfmShareSong.description: Show link to song on stats.fm.

sfmHideWithSpotify.description: Hide stats.fm presence if Spotify is running.

sfmHideWithExternalRpc.description: Hide stats.fm presence if an external RPC is running.

sfmShowLogo.description: Show Stats.fm logo next to album art.

jfShowEpisodeName.description: Show episode name after season/episode info.

jfShowPausedState.description: Show presence when media is paused.

lbShareSong.description: Show link to song on ListenBrainz.

lbHideWithSpotify.description: Hide presence if Spotify is running.

lbHideWithActivity.description: Hide presence if any other presence exists.

lbUseTimeBar.description: Use track duration to display a time bar.

lbUseLogo.description: Show ListenBrainz logo on album art.

RPCEditor.description: Edit the type and content of any Rich Presence (Equicord-only)

RPCStats.description: Displays stats about your activity as an rpc (Equicord-only)

assetURL.description: The image to use for your rpc. Your profile picture is used if left blank

statDisplay.description:
What should the rpc display? (you can only have one line i'm pretty sure)

Values: 0 = The amount of messages sent today, 1 = The amount of messages sent all time, 2 = Your most listened album for the week

albumCoverImage.description: Should the album cover image be used as the rpc image? (if you have the last fm display chosen)

lastFMStatFormat.description: How should the last fm stat be formatted? $album is replaced with the album name, and $artist is replaced with the artist name

showToolboxButton.description: Show 'Save Favorite GIFs' button in Equicord Toolbox (Requires Reload) (restart required)

scheduledMessages.description: Schedule messages to be sent at a specific time or after a delay. (Equicord-only)

maxMessagesPerMinute.description: Max scheduled messages per channel that can fire in the same minute.

checkIntervalSeconds.description: How often to check for messages to send (seconds).

showNotifications.description: Show toast notifications when messages are sent.

showPhantomMessages.description: Show scheduled messages as phantom messages in chat.

searchFix.description: Fixes the annoying "We dropped the magnifying glass!" error. (Equicord-only)

sekaiStickers.description: Sekai Stickers built in discord originally from github.com/TheOriginalAyaka (Equicord-only)

selfForward.description: Adds the current channel to the forward list popup (Equicord-only)

serverInfo.description: Allows you to view info about a server (Equicord-only)

sorting.description: Username or if applicable Display Name

serverSearch.description: Navigate your servers better with a quick search button (Equicord-only)

showBadgesInChat.description: Shows the message author's badges beside their name in chat. (Equicord-only)

showEquicordDonor.description: Enable to show Equicord Donor badges in chat.

equicordDonorPosition.description: The position of the Equicord Donor badges.

showEquicordContributor.description: Enable to show Equicord Contributor badges in chat.

equicordContributorPosition.description: The position of the Equicord Contributor badge.

showVencordDonor.description: Enable to show Vencord donor badges in chat.

vencordDonorPosition.description: The position of the Vencord Donor badges.

showVencordContributor.description: Enable to show Vencord contributor badges in chat.

vencordContributorPosition.description: The position of the Vencord Contributor badge.

showDiscordProfile.description: Enable to show Discord profile badges in chat.

discordProfilePosition.description: The position of the Discord profile badges.

showDiscordNitro.description: Enable to show Discord Nitro badges in chat.

discordNitroPosition.description: The position of the Discord Nitro badge.

showHiddenChannels.description: Show channels that you do not have access to view. (Equicord-only)

channelStyle.description:
The style used to display hidden channels. (restart required)

Values: 0 = Classic, 1 = Muted, 2 = Show Unreads, 3 = Muted and Show Unreads

showMode.description:
The mode used to display hidden channels. (restart required)

Values: 0 = Lock Icon replacing channel icon, 2 = Eye icon on the right, 1 = Lock icon on the right

defaultAllowedUsersAndRolesDropdownState.description: Whether the allowed users and roles dropdown on hidden channels should be open by default

showMessageEmbeds.description: Adds a context menu option to show embeds for links that don't have one (Equicord-only)

showMeYourName.description: Display any permutation of custom nicknames, friend nicknames, server nicknames, display names, and usernames in chat. (Equicord-only)

messages.description: Display custom name format in messages.

replies.description: Display custom name format in replies.

mentions.description: Display custom name format in mentions.

typingIndicator.description: Display the first available name listed in your custom name format in the typing indicator.

memberList.description: Display the first available name listed in your custom name format in the members list, DMs list, and friends list.

profilePopout.description: Display the first available name listed in your custom name format in profile popouts.

voiceChannels.description: Display the first available name listed in your custom name format in voice channels.

reactions.description: Display the first available name listed in your custom name format in reaction tooltips, and the full name in reaction popouts.

discriminators.description: Append discriminators to usernames for bots. Discriminators were deprecated for users, but are still used for bots. By default, a bot's username is equivalent to a user's global name, therefore multiple bots can have the same username. Appending discriminators makes them unique again.

hideDefaultAtSign.description: Hide the default "@" symbol before the name in mentions and replies. Only applied if either feature is enabled.

truncateAllNamesWithStreamerMode.description: Truncate all names, not just usernames, while in Streamer Mode.

removeDuplicates.description: If any of the names are equivalent, remove them, leaving only the unique names.

ignoreFonts.description: For the non-primary names, use Discord's default fonts regardless of the user's custom nitro font.

ignoreGradients.description: For the non-primary names, if the role has a gradient and the color below is set to "Role+-#", use the primary color instead of the whole gradient, and if it has a nitro effect, ignore it entirely.

animateGradients.description: For the non-primary names, if the role has a gradient or nitro effect, animate it. This is disabled by "Ignore Gradients" and reduced motion.

nameSeparator.description: The separator to use between names. The default is a single space.

friendNameOnlyInDirectMessages.description: Only display friend names when in DMs, and not in servers.

customNameOnlyInDirectMessages.description: Only display custom names when in DMs, and not in servers.

includedNames.description: The order to display usernames, display names, nicknames, friend names, and custom names. Use the following placeholders: {user}, {display}, {nick}, {friend}, {custom}. You can provide multiple name options to use as fallbacks if one is unavailable by separating them with commas as such: {custom, friend, nick}. You can have up to three prefixes and three suffixes per name.

customNameColor.description: The color to use for the custom name you assigned a user if it's not the first displayed. Accepts any valid CSS input. Use "Role" to follow the user's top role colors, nitro effect colors, or IRCColors color if enabled. Use "Role+-#" to adjust the brightness by that percentage (ex: "Role+15")

friendNameColor.description: The color to use for a friend's nickname if it's not the first displayed. Accepts any valid CSS input. Use "Role" to follow the user's top role colors, nitro effect colors, or IRCColors color if enabled. Use "Role+-#" to adjust the brightness by that percentage (ex: "Role+15")

nicknameColor.description: The color to use for the nickname if it's not the first displayed. Accepts any valid CSS input. Use "Role" to follow the user's top role colors, nitro effect colors, or IRCColors color if enabled. Use "Role+-#" to adjust the brightness by that percentage (ex: "Role+15")

displayNameColor.description: The color to use for the display name if it's not the first displayed. Accepts any valid CSS input. Use "Role" to follow the user's top role colors, nitro effect colors, or IRCColors color if enabled. Use "Role+-#" to adjust the brightness by that percentage (ex: "Role+15")

usernameColor.description: The color to use for the username if it's not the first displayed. Accepts any valid CSS input. Use "Role" to follow the user's top role colors, nitro effect colors, or IRCColors color if enabled. Use "Role+-#" to adjust the brightness by that percentage (ex: "Role+15")

triggerNameRerender.description: Trigger a name rerender by toggling this setting.

showResourceChannels.description: shows the channels hidden behind the server resources in the channel list (Equicord-only)

showSongName.description: Shows song name instead of artist for Spotify activity (Equicord-only)

sidebarChat.description: Open a another channel or a DM as a sidebar or as a popout (Equicord-only)

name.description: The signature that will be added to the end of your messages

textHeader.description: What header to preface text with

showIcon.description: Show an icon for toggling the plugin in the chat bar (restart required)

contextMenu.description: Add option to toggle the functionality in the chat input context menu

silentTyping.description: Hide your typing indicator from chat. (Equicord-only)

enabledGlobally.description: Toggle functionality of your own typing indicator globally.

hideChatBoxTypingIndicators.description: Hide other users' typing indicators from above the chat bar.

hideMembersListTypingIndicators.description: Hide other users' typing indicators from the members list.

chatIcon.description: Show an icon in the chat bar for modifying the plugin on the go.

chatIconLeftClickAction.description: What to do when left clicking the chat icon.

chatIconMiddleClickAction.description: What to do when middle clicking the chat icon.

chatIconRightClickAction.description: What to do when right clicking the chat icon.

chatContextMenu.description: Show a dropdown in the chat context menu to modify plugin settings on the go.

defaultHidden.description: If enabled, the plugin will hide your typing from others in any DMs/channels/guilds not listed in "Disabled Locations" below. If disabled, the plugin will show your typing to others for any DMs/channels/guilds not listed in "Enabled Locations" below.

enabledLocations.description: Enable functionality for these IDs. Accepts a comma separated list of DM IDs, channel IDs, and guild IDs. Only used if "Default Hidden" is disabled.

disabledLocations.description: Disable functionality for these IDs. Accepts a comma separated list of DM IDs, channel IDs, and guild IDs. Only used if "Default Hidden" is enabled.

snowfall.description: Let it snow on Discord! Ported from the BetterDiscord plugin by square. (Equicord-only)

typeOfSnow.description: Change the type of snow displayed (Affects performance).

soggy.description: Adds a soggy button to the toolbox (Equicord-only)

songVolume.description: Volume of the song. 0 to disable

tooltipText.description: The text shown when hovering over the button

imageLink.description: URL for the image (button and modal)

songLink.description: URL for the song to play
Adds streaming service buttons below song links (Equicord-only)

userCountry.description: Country used for lookup (Two letter country code)

songSpotlight.description: Show off songs on your profile (Equicord-only)

collapseSongList.description: Collapses the song list on user profiles to a button which opens a separate menu

profileSongsLimit.description: How many songs are shown when initially clicking on a user

sortFriends.description: Sorts friend requests by date of receipt (Equicord-only)

showDates.description: Show dates on friend requests (restart required)

splitLargeMessages.description: Splits large messages into multiple to fit Discord's message limit. (Equicord-only)

maxLength.description: Maximum length of a message before it is split. Set to 0 to automatically detect.

disableFileConversion.description: If true, disables file conversion for large messages.

sendDelay.description: Delay between each chunk in seconds.

hardSplit.description: If true, splits on the last character instead of the last space/newline.

splitInSlowmode.description: Should messages be split if the channel has slowmode enabled?

slowmodeMax.description: Maximum slowmode time if splitting in slowmode.

spotifyActivityToggle.description: Adds a toggle button for Spotify activity visibility. (Equicord-only)

location.description: Where to show the Spotify toggle button.

statusPresets.description: Allows you to remember your statuses and set them later (Equicord-only)

statusWhileActive.description: Automatically updates your online status when in a voice channel. (Equicord-only)

statusToSet.description: Status to set while in a voice channel.

steamStatusSync.description: Sync your status to Steam! (Online, Away, Invisible, or Offline.) (Equicord-only)

dndStatus.description: Steam status when on Do Not Disturb

goInvisibleIfActivityIsHidden.description: Always go invisible if hiding game activity on Discord

stickerBlocker.description: Allows you to block stickers from being displayed. (Equicord-only)

showGif.description: Whether to show a snazzy cat gif (restart required)

showMessage.description: Whether to show a message detailing which id was blocked (restart required)

showButton.description: Whether to show a button to unblock the gif (restart required)

blockedStickers.description: The list of blocked sticker IDs (don't edit unless you know what you're doing)

streamingCodecDisabler.description: Disable codecs for streaming of your choice (Equicord-only)

disableAv1Codec.description: Make Discord not consider using AV1 for streaming.

disableH265Codec.description: Make Discord not consider using H265 for streaming.

disableH264Codec.description: Make Discord not consider using H264 for streaming.

disableVP8Codec.description: Make Discord not consider using VP8 for streaming.

disableVP9Codec.description: Make Discord not consider using VP9 for streaming.

talkInReverse.description: Reverses the message content before sending it. (Equicord-only)

textReplace.description: Replace text in your or others' messages. You can find pre-made rules in the #textreplace-rules channel in Vencord's Server. (Equicord-only)

stringRules.description: Rules for replacing text using string matching.

regexRules.description: Rules for replacing text using regular expressions.

themeLibrary.description: A library of themes for Vencord. (Equicord-only)

tidalEmbeds.description: Embeds TIDAL songs to make them playable in Discord. (Equicord-only)

TiktokTTS.description: Adds a context menu option to read out chat messages with the good ol' Tiktok TTS voice :sob: (Equicord-only)

timezones.description: Shows the local time of users in profiles and message headers (Equicord-only)

showOwnTimezone.description: Show your own timezone in profiles and message headers

showTimezoneInfo.description: Show timezone info next to time

useDatabase.description: Enable database for getting user timezones

preferDatabaseOverLocal.description: Prefer database over local storage for timezones

askedTimezone.description: Whether the user has been asked to set their timezone

toastNotifications.description: Show a toast notification whenever you receive a direct message. (Equicord-only)

position.description: The position of the toast notification

timeout.description: Time in seconds notifications will be shown for

maxNotifications.description: Maximum number of notifications displayed at once

determineServerNotifications.description: Automatically determine what server notifications to show based on your channel/guild settings

disableInStreamerMode.description: Disable notifications while in streamer mode

friendServerNotifications.description: Show notifications when friends send messages in servers they share with you

friendActivity.description: Show notifications for adding someone or receiving a friend request

streamingTreatment.description:
How to treat notifications while sharing your screen

Values: 0 = Normal - Show the notification as normal, 1 = No Content - Hide the notification body, 2 = Ignore - Don't show the notification at all

notifyFor.description: Create a list of channel ids to receive notifications from (separate with commas)

ignoreUsers.description: Create a list of user ids to ignore all their notifications from (separate with commas)

toggleVideoBind.description: Adds a customizable bind to toggle webcam. (Equicord-only)

keyBind.description: The key to toggle webcam when pressed.

toneIndicators.description: Show tooltips for tone indicators like /srs, /gen, etc. in sent messages. (Equicord-only)

translate.description: Vencord's translate plugin but with support for artistic languages! (Equicord-only)

TriviaAI.description: A plugin that helps you answer trivia questions using AI. (Equicord-only)

apiKey.example: Enter API Key here for your AI endpoint.

systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful assistant who answers questions for the user in a concise and short way while using the least amount of words and punctuation.

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in the response.

endpoint.example: Enter your OpenAI compatible AI endpoint here.

autoRespond.description: Automatically respond to messages on receiving a response.

supportImages.description: Pass images to the AI for context (if any). This is not supported by all models.

typingIndicator.description: Adds an indicator if someone is typing on a channel. (Equicord-only)

includeCurrentChannel.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for the currently selected channel

includeMutedChannels.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for muted channels.

includeIgnoredUsers.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for ignored users.

includeBlockedUsers.description: Whether to show the typing indicator for blocked users.

indicatorMode.description:
How should the indicator be displayed?

Values: 3 = Avatars and animated dots, 1 = Animated dots, 2 = Avatars

typingTweaks.description: Show avatars and role colours in the typing indicator (Equicord-only)

showAvatars.description: Show avatars in the typing indicator

showRoleColors.description: Show role colors in the typing indicator

alternativeFormatting.description: Show a more useful message when several users are typing

amITyping.description: Shows you if other people can see you typing (restart required)

unitConverter.description: Converts metric units to Imperal units and vice versa (Equicord-only)

myUnits.description: the units you use and want things converted to. defaults to imperial

universalMention.description: Mention any user, regardless of channel access. (Equicord-only)

globalMention.description: Mention users from any server, not just the current one (restart required)

onlyDMUsers.description: Only show users you've had DMs with (restart required)

unlimitedAccounts.description: Increases the amount of accounts you can add. (Equicord-only)

maxAccounts.description: Number of accounts that can be added, or 0 for no limit (restart required)

unreadCountBadge.description: Shows unread message count badges on channels in the channel list (Equicord-only)

showOnMutedChannels.description: Show unread count on muted channels

urlHighlighter.description: Highlights URLs in messages that match your patterns. (Equicord-only)

patterns.description: URL patterns to highlight using glob patterns.

highlightEmbeds.description: Also highlight URLs in embed content.

UserPFP.description: Allows you to use an animated avatar without Nitro (Equicord-only)

overrideServerAvatars.description: Override server avatars with custom avatars or the default user avatar if no custom avatar is set.

preferNitro.description: Which avatar to use if both default animated (Nitro) pfp and UserPFP avatars are present

vcNarratorCustom.description: Announces when users join, leave, or move voice channels via narrator using TikTok TTS. Revamped and back from the dead. (Equicord-only)

latinOnly.description: Strip non latin characters from names before saying them

announceOthersMute.description: Announce when other users mute/unmute in your current VC

announceOthersDeafen.description: Announce when other users deafen/undeafen in your current VC

announceOthersStream.description: Announce when other users start/stop streaming in your current VC

userVoiceMap.description: Per-user voice overrides (format: userId:voiceId,userId2:voiceId2). Right-click users to set.

stateChangeFilterMode.description: Filter which users trigger state-change announcements

stateChangeFilterList.description: Comma-separated user IDs for whitelist/blacklist. Right-click users to add/remove.

ignoredUsers.description: Comma-separated user IDs to completely ignore (no join/leave/move/state announcements). Right-click users to add/remove.

joinLeaveTimeout.description: Per-user cooldown for join/leave/move announcements (seconds). Prevents spam from rapid rejoiners.

VCPanelSettings.description: Control voice settings right from the voice panel (Equicord-only)

uncollapseSettingsByDefault.description: Automatically uncollapse voice settings by default

showOutputVolumeHeader.description: Show header above output volume slider

showInputVolumeHeader.description: Show header above input volume slider

showOutputDeviceHeader.description: Show header above output device selector

showInputDeviceHeader.description: Show header above input device selector

viewRawVariant.description: Copy/View raw content of any message, channel, or guild, but show in the right click menu. (Equicord-only)

voiceButtons.description: Quickly DM, mute, or deafen any user right from the voice-call panel. (Equicord-only)

showChatButton.description: Whether you want to display the chat button (restart required)

showMuteButton.description: Whether you want to display the mute button (restart required)

showDeafenButton.description: Whether you want to display the deafen button (restart required)

muteSoundboard.description: Toggles their soundboard upon clicking deafen button.

disableVideo.description: Toggles their video upon clicking deafen button.

useServer.description: Use server mute/deafen instead of local when you have permission.

serverSelf.description: Deafen / Mute yourself on the server when using mute/deafen.

showButtonsSelf.description: Whether you want to display buttons for your own user. Same functionality as other button(s) except it'll open DMs panel and mute/deafen for yourself upon clicking button(s). (restart required)

whichNameToShow.description: Choose whether to show nickname or username in tooltip.

buttonPosition.description: Choose where to place voice buttons in the voice user row.

voiceChannelLog.description: Logs voice channel activity including joins, leaves, soundboard, mute, camera, screenshare, and more. (Equicord-only)

logJoinLeave.description: Log when users join, leave, or move between voice channels.

logSoundboard.description: Log when users play soundboard sounds.

logMuteDeafen.description: Log when users are server muted or deafened.

logVideo.description: Log when users turn their camera on or off.

logStream.description: Log when users start or stop screensharing.

logActivity.description: Log when users start embedded activities.

soundboardFileType.description: File format for downloading soundboard sounds.

soundboardVolume.description: Preview volume for soundboard sounds (0 to disable).

voiceChatUtilities.description: This plugin allows you to perform multiple actions on an entire channel (move, mute, disconnect, etc.) (originally by dutake) (Equicord-only)

waitAfter.description: Amount of API actions to perform before waiting (to avoid rate limits)

waitSeconds.description: Time to wait between each action (in seconds)

voiceJoinMessages.description: Recieve client-side ephemeral messages when your friends join voice channels (Equicord-only)

friendDirectMessages.description: Recieve notifications in your friends' DMs when they join a voice channel

friendDirectMessagesShowMembers.description: Show a list of other members in the voice channel when recieving a DM notification of your friend joining a voice channel

friendDirectMessagesShowMemberCount.description: Show the count of other members in the voice channel when recieving a DM notification of your friend joining a voice channel

friendDirectMessagesSelf.description: Recieve notifications in your friends' DMs even if you are in the same voice channel as them

friendDirectMessagesSilent.description: Join messages in your friends DMs will be silent

allowedFriends.description: Comma or space separated list of friends' user IDs you want to recieve join messages from

ignoredFriends.description: Comma or space separated list of friends' user IDs you do NOT want to recieve join messages from

ignoreBlockedUsers.description: Do not send messages about blocked users joining/leaving/moving voice channels

voiceMessageTranscriber.description: On-device transcriptions for voice messages powered by Whisper v3 (Equicord-only)

quantized.description: Use quantized model (smaller size, slightly lower accuracy)

voiceRejoin.description: Rejoins DM/Server call automatically when restarting Discord. (Equicord-only)

rejoinDelay.description: Set Delay before rejoining voice channel.

rejoinTimeout.description: Don't attempt to rejoin after this many seconds have passed since disconnecting.

preventReconnectIfCallEnded.description: Do not reconnect if the call has ended or the voice channel is empty or does not exist.

waitForSlot.description: Automatically join a full voice channel when a slot opens. (Equicord-only)

autoJoin.description: Join the channel immediately instead of showing a notice.

notificationSound.description: Play a sound when a slot becomes available.

wallpaperFree.description: Recreation of the old DM wallpaper experiment; Set a background image for any channel, user or server. (Equicord-only)

webpackTarball.description: Converts Discord's webpack sources into a tarball. (Equicord-only)

whitelistedEmojis.description: Adds the ability to disable all message emojis except for a whitelisted set. (Equicord-only)

whoReacted.description: Renders the avatars of users who reacted to a message (Equicord-only)

avatarClick.description: Toggle clicking avatars in reactions (restart required)

whosWatching.description: Hover over the screenshare icon to view what users are watching your stream (Equicord-only)

showPanel.description: Show spectators under screenshare panel (restart required)

wigglyText.description: Adds a new markdown formatting that makes text wiggly. (Equicord-only)

writeUpperCase.description: Changes the first Letter of each Sentence in Message Inputs to Uppercase (Equicord-only)

blockedWords.description: Strings not to capitilise (seperate with a comma)
